'''ngakungu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:encephalitis|encephalitis]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-k-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:encephalitis|encephalitis]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| ngakungu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngækingith|ngækingith]] || [[word:ngækingij|ngækingij]] || [[word:ngækingish|ngækingish]] || [[word:ngækingi|ngækingi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngakukunguth|ngakukunguth]] || [[word:ngakukunguj|ngakukunguj]] || [[word:ngakukungush|ngakukungush]] || [[word:ngakukungu|ngakukungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngakunguth|ngakunguth]] || [[word:ngakunguj|ngakunguj]] || [[word:ngakungush|ngakungush]] || [[word:ngakungu|ngakungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngakufnguth|ngakufnguth]] || [[word:ngakufnguj|ngakufnguj]] || [[word:ngakufngush|ngakufngush]] || [[word:ngakufnguf|ngakufnguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngakunguthu|ngakunguthu]] || [[word:ngakunguju|ngakunguju]] || [[word:ngakungushu|ngakungushu]] || [[word:ngakunguku|ngakunguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngakunguth|ngakunguth]] || [[word:ngakunguj|ngakunguj]] || [[word:ngakungush|ngakungush]] || [[word:ngakungu|ngakungu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngakunguthul|ngakunguthul]] || [[word:ngakungujul|ngakungujul]] || [[word:ngakungushul|ngakungushul]] || [[word:ngakungukul|ngakungukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngakunguthuthu|ngakunguthuthu]] || [[word:ngakungujuju|ngakungujuju]] || [[word:ngakungushushu|ngakungushushu]] || [[word:ngakunguku|ngakunguku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngakunguthun|ngakunguthun]] || [[word:ngakungujun|ngakungujun]] || [[word:ngakungushun|ngakungushun]] || [[word:ngakungukun|ngakungukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngakunguthuoro|ngakunguthuoro]] || [[word:ngakungujuoro|ngakungujuoro]] || [[word:ngakungushuoro|ngakungushuoro]] || [[word:ngakungukuoro|ngakungukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
